final_answer:
Yes, Phase 2 is implemented.

Why this matters: `MsgValidatorJoin` is now clean native stake input (no bridge event metadata), so validator-join flow is aligned with the native-path architecture instead of legacy bridge-coupled fields.

I removed `tx_hash/log_index/block_number/nonce` from `MsgValidatorJoin` in [tx.proto](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/proto/giltconsensusv2/stake/tx.proto:29), and regenerated outputs so join no longer has those fields in [tx.pb.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/types/tx.pb.go:36) and [tx.pulsar.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/api/giltconsensusv2/stake/tx.pulsar.go:4315).  
While validating, regen introduced naming fallouts (`Giltconsensus...`/`IsProcessedByGiltconsensus`) and amino-name-length panics; I fixed the affected callsites and codec registrations in [params.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/chainmanager/types/params.go:27), [tx.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/common/cli/tx.go:98), [app.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/app/app.go:580), [grpc_query.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/clerk/keeper/grpc_query.go:259), [checkpoint codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/checkpoint/types/codec.go:14), [chainmanager codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/chainmanager/types/codec.go:14), and [milestone codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/milestone/types/codec.go:14).

Checks run and passing:
`go test ./x/stake/... -count=1`
`go test ./x/chainmanager/... -count=1`
`go test ./x/clerk/... -count=1`
`go test ./bridge/... -count=1`

Next steps:
1. Proceed to your Phase 3 (remove legacy bridge metadata from remaining stake msgs if that is your next planned cut).  
2. If you want final merge gate, run full `go test ./...` once after completing all remaining phases.
